top_signals.title: US Consumers’ Inflation Expectations Rose in June, NY Fed Survey Says
top_signals.summary: Americans’ expectations for inflation over the near and medium term rose in June amid strong increases anticipated for medical care costs and rent, according to a Federal Reserve Bank of New York survey released Tuesday.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Bloomberg Surveillance 7/7/2026
top_signals.summary: Jonathan Ferro, Lisa Abramowicz and Annmarie Hordern speak daily with leaders and decision makers from Wall Street to Washington and beyond. No other program better positions investors and executives for the trading day. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.summary: Oil Holds Drop as Saudi Arabian Price Cut Amplifies Glut Concern  Bloomberg.com
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Gemini offers 0% stock trading in US as it looks to become ‘all-in-one financial super app’
top_signals.summary: Gemini said it is looking to become an “all-in-one financial super app" as it launches 0% commission stock trading for eligible U.S. users.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
